← Back to MIRAC Technologies

Real Estate CRM Riyadh & Saudi Arabia — Vision 2030 Ready | MIRAC

Advanced property management and CRM software built for the thriving Saudi real estate market.

As Saudi Arabia rapidly develops under Vision 2030, the real estate sector in Riyadh, Jeddah, and across the Kingdom is experiencing unprecedented growth. Real estate agencies and property managers face a massive influx of buyers, investors, and new developments. Managing this volume of inquiries, properties, and transactions using generic tools or manual spreadsheets is no longer sustainable. MIRAC Technologies provides a sophisticated Real Estate CRM tailored specifically for Saudi Arabia. Our solution helps agencies consolidate leads from multiple digital channels, automatically route them to the appropriate sales agents, and track every interaction until the deal is closed. The CRM supports complete Arabic language localization, ensuring seamless operation for local teams and clients. It features robust property management capabilities, allowing agencies to maintain an up-to-date inventory of commercial and residential units, track payment schedules, and manage complex leasing contracts. To align with national goals, the system also includes reporting modules that

assist with Vision 2030 compliance and local regulatory requirements. With advanced analytics, agency directors can gain real-time insights into market trends, agent performance, and lead conversion rates. By automating administrative tasks, follow-ups, and document handling, our CRM empowers Saudi real estate professionals to scale their operations efficiently and capitalize on the Kingdom's booming property market. Managing this volume of inquiries, properties, and transactions using generic tools or manual spreadsheets is no longer sustainable. MIRAC Technologies provides a sophisticated Real Estate CRM tailored specifically for Saudi Arabia. Our solution helps agencies consolidate leads from multiple digital channels, automatically route them to the appropriate sales agents, and track

every interaction until the deal is closed. The CRM supports complete Arabic language localization, ensuring seamless operation for local teams and clients. It features robust property management capabilities, allowing agencies to maintain an up-to-date inventory of commercial and residential units, track payment schedules, and manage complex leasing contracts. To align with national goals, the system also includes reporting modules that assist with Vision 2030 compliance and local regulatory requirements. With advanced analytics, agency directors can gain real-time insights into market trends, agent performance, and lead conversion rates. By automating administrative tasks, follow-ups, and document handling, our CRM empowers Saudi real estate professionals to scale their operations efficiently and capitalize on the Kingdom's booming property market.
